name: GIGABYTE X670 GAMING X AX V2 ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - AMD X670 Chipset - 1x PCIe 4.0 x16 - Support DDR5-8000(OC) - 1x PCIe 5.0 x4 M.2-25110 - 3x PCIe 4.0 x4 M.2 - USB-C 3.2 Gen 2x2 - HDMI 2.1 - 2.5GbE LAN - 802.11ax Wi-Fi 6E
shortName: GIGABYTE X670 GAMING X AX V2 ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - AMD X670
description: ATX gaming motherboard for AMD Ryzen 7000 series with X670 chipset and PCIe 5.0 M.2 support.
